content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw,expMs,nowMs,skew30)
C: expMs∧nowMs∧401
H: expMs<nowMs→401 ∧ expMs+30000<nowMs→401
P: expMs+30000>=nowMs→allow
V: skew30
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth middleware, expMs, nowMs, 30-second grace window).
Constraints: expMs and nowMs and 401.
Hypothesis: expMs<nowMs then 401 and expMs+30000<nowMs then 401.
Plan: expMs+30000>=nowMs then allow.
Verify: 30-second grace window.
Answer target: regression test.

G: fix(refresh rotation replay handling)
C: ...∧...
H: parallel refresh race can cause duplicate 409s on the same old_refresh_token
P: reject replay only once; subsequent retries should not loop on 409
V: old_refresh_token reused ∧ first replay detected ∧ then one-time reject → no repeated

G: fix(edge(-30s_200)∧edge(-31s_401))
C: webhook verify timestamp
H: abs(now-ts)>300=>401
P: provider skew only→allow within 30s negative drift
V: edge(-30s_200)∧edge(-31s_401)
R:

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(1000↔401_exp_unit_normalization)

C: exp_ms∧now_s∧exp_lt_now→401

H: normalize ∧ exp ∧ to ∧ seconds ∧ once ∧ at ∧ callback ∧ boundary ∧ compare ∧ sec/sec ∧ only

P: parse ∧ exp→sec→store/compare→401

V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(1000↔401_exp_unit_normalization).
Constraints: exp_ms and now_s and exp_lt_now then 401.
Hypothesis: normalize and exp and to and seconds and once and at and callback and boundary and compare and sec/sec and only.
Plan: parse and exp then security then store/compare then 401.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(ttl_boundary_revalidate_loop)

C: age>=ttl ∧ exact_boundary ∧ revalidate_loop

H: stale ∧ computed ∧ with ∧ >= ∧ at ∧ boundary

P: age>ttl → stale ∧ age<=ttl → fresh

V: ttl=60 ∧ age=60 ∧ fresh ∧ ttl
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(ttl_boundary_revalidate_loop).
Constraints: age>=ttl and exact_boundary and revalidate_loop.
Hypothesis: stale and computed and with and >= and at and boundary.
Plan: age>ttl then stale and age<=ttl then fresh.
Verify: ttl=60 and age=60 and fresh and ttl.
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(reset_edge_once)
C: now>reset ∧ burst_429
H: allow_at_reset_once
P: now>=reset→allow_once ∧ now<reset→deny
V: reset_boundary∧no_retry_storm
R: !early_release
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(reset_edge_once).
Constraints: now>reset and burst_429.
Hypothesis: allow_at_reset_once.
Plan: now>=reset then allow_once and now<reset then deny.
Verify: reset_boundary and no_retry_storm.
Risk: high-risk early_release.
Answer target: regression test.

G: fix(public ping auth guard)

C: auth guard ∧ public ping ∧ !session ∧ 401
H: public ping needs bypass when no session
P: !session→200 on ping ∧ keep 401 for protected routes
V: healthcheck/ping bypass ∧ sessionless public ping works
R:

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(overdue_middleware_grace24h_boundary_charge_loop)

C: overdue => 402 ∧ grace24h_exactly ∧ billing_overdue_middleware

H: overdue_at_t0 → charge_allowed_until_t0+24h_exclusive ∧ t0+24h → 402

P: if ∧ now ∧ <
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(overdue_middleware_grace24h_boundary_charge_loop).
Constraints: overdue implies 402 and grace24h_exactly and billing_overdue_middleware.
Hypothesis: overdue_at_t0 then charge_allowed_until_t0+24h_exclusive and t0+24h then 402.
Plan: if and now and <.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.
